race.comment: SPIONE (6) above average gelding who returns from a five-month spell. Raced in tougher company last time in and has excellent first-up credentials. Fitted with the two trials and look for him charging late from the good gate. ALIGNED (7) racing in career best form and returned from a let-up with a fading fourth in this grade over 1400m at Warwick Farm. Fitter now and the addition of visors can do the trick from the inside barrier. UNSTOPABULL (9) frustrating gelding who will appreciate the decent weight drop. Gave his all under the 59kg with a tenacious fourth over 1200m at Warwick Farm in BM72 company. Stalks the good tempo and not without top-three claims. ARRIVING HOME (3) massive drop in class today after she ran ninth in the G3 Birthday Card Stakes at Rosehill over 1200m. Proven at the trip and can overcome the awkward gate.
